title: clear()
text: clear() Removes all occurrences of the entity on the client. EntityObject . clear() ; Arguments None Description Calling clear on an entity immediately removes all of its occurrences on the client, as well as all occurrences of the entities that they contain. They no longer participate in subsequent requests to the server. After this function is called, the occurrences are no longer valid, so many of their functions will throw a uniface.InvalidDataObjectException . Related Links uniface.Entity The uniface.Entity object provides access to selected properties of the component entity that it represents. It is returned by the getEntities and getEntity functions of the uniface.Instance and uniface.Occurrence objects. Was this topic helpful? Like Dislike
